headline: Assessing Henry Schein (HSIC) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Henry Schein stock: recent move and context for investors Henry Schein (HSIC) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading left the shares around $77.60, with performance over the past month and past 3 months differing from the shorter term moves. See our latest analysis for Henry Schein. The 1 day share price return of a 3.21% decline and 7 day share price return of a 5.81% decline contrast with a 30 day share price return of 3.11% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 4.04%.
